channel.title: wabisebi
channel.description: Japan, language learning and other things

item.title: Title on https://wabisebi.github.io/title-on-this-lie.htmlhttps://wabisebi.github.io/title-on-this-lie.htmlthis lie
item.description:
The rest of the text file is an html blog post. The process will continue as soon as you exit yourZettelkasten (German for "slip box") is a personal knowledge management system designed to organize, connect, and retrieve ideas and information effectively. It was popularized by the German sociologist Niklas Luhmann, who used it to produce an enormous body of work, including over 70 books and hundreds of articles. Zettelkasten (German for "slip box") is a personal knowledge management system designed to organize, connect, and retrieve ideas and information effectively. It was popularized by the German sociologist Niklas Luhmann, who used it to produce an enormous body of work, including over 70 books and hundreds of articles.
